title: The Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act, 2005
full_text: The Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act, 2005 घरेलू हिंसा से महिला संरक्षण अधिनियम, 2005 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200543 Act Number: 43 Enactment Date: 2005-09-13 Act Year: 2005 Short Title: The Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act, 2005 Hindi Title: घरेलू हिंसा से महिला संरक्षण अधिनियम, 2005 Long Title: An Act to provide for more effective protection of the rights of women guaranteed under the Constitution who are victims of violence of any kind occurring within the family and formatters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development Enforcement Date: 26-10-2006 Notification: 26th October, 2006, vide notification No. S.O. 1776(E), dated by 17th October, 2006, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
